Document:
# Core Rule 7 - Minimodding
If you witness a possible rulebreak do not Minimod, instead alert Admins by pressing F1 to AHelp the issue. Do not shout that you are AHelping in LOOC, OOC, or in character or you will be punished for Minimodding. You may suggest someone Ahelp in LOOC, but do not say "I am AHelping" or "I am going to AHelp" or anything of the sort.
## Examples
### Permitted
- A player saying in LOOC "I think you should AHelp this issue" or "This seems like it should be AHelped" or anything of the sort.
### Not Permitted
- Shouting in LOOC "I am AHelping" or "I am going to AHelp" or anything of the sort. - Shouting in character "I am AHelping" or "I am going to AHelp" or anything of the sort.
